theme: apprentices assigned to workshops across districts
title: Seat Quotas for the Apprentice Match
strategies: uniform quotas: split the seat budget as evenly as possible across workshops (the checker baseline)
demand-proportional quotas: hand out seats in proportion to first-choice demand (the trap: starves sleeper lifelines, over-funds decoy workshops)
chain-aware coordinate ascent: simulate the actual deferred-acceptance matching and move seats between workshops only when the true rank-utility rises, catching rejection chains at the sleepers
seed a good init from demand, then repair the worst rejection cascades by shifting seats from low-marginal-value workshops onto the workshops that intercept the longest chains
